channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I Built a Lightweight Python RAG Orchestrator That Works with SQLite, PGVector and Qdrant
item.description: Most RAG frameworks today assume: a huge dependency graph mandatory LLM orchestration opinionated pipelines complex configuration But many real-world systems need something simpler. Especially...

item.description: Let’s get one thing straight right out of the gate: if you hang around engineering forums, you’ve probably seen the dramatic headlines or Reddit threads claiming “Redis is dead.” Why? Because a...

item.title: The Project I Couldn’t Finish 2 Years Ago - Notebook for ChatGPT
item.description: This is a submission for the GitHub Finish-Up-A-Thon Challenge What I Built Two years ago, while using ChatGPT, I kept having the same thought: “Why does this feel so temporary?” Some...

item.description: If you are building modern, cloud-native applications, you already know that containers and microservices are the gold standard. They give your architecture portability, scalability, and rapid...

item.title: Modern css kills js
item.description: Modern CSS is evolving at an incredible pace. Tasks that previously required heavy libraries or complex JavaScript scripts are now becoming native parts of the browser engine. This not only...

item.title: 15 AI Coding Hacks Nobody Talks About (2026)
item.description: Every AI coding tutorial shows you the basics. "Write a function that does X." Cool. Thanks. Here are the tricks that actually matter — the ones you only learn after burning hours on real...

item.description: Your AI Agents Need an Architecture, Not Just a Prompt Picture your finance team during month-end close. Data is scattered across the ERP, spreadsheets arriving by email, and manual notes from...

item.title: AI coding assistants are making juniors worse and seniors lazier
item.description: Copilot is quietly eroding two different skill sets at once. And almost nobody is talking about it honestly. GitHub Copilot has exceeded 1.5 million paid subscribers. It's safe to say it's now an...

item.title: Shopify vs Magento for AI Commerce in 2026: Platform-Mediated vs Merchant-Controlled AEO
item.description: In March 2026, Shopify positioned its eligible merchants for default discovery inside ChatGPT via Agentic Storefronts — no per-merchant setup required. Two months later, the same week Shopify...

item.title: A $2,000 AI-generated film will make its debut at Tribeca
item.description: Next month's Tribeca Festival will include the premiere of an AI-generated film: Dreams of Violets. The 75-minute film is a fictional dramatization of the Iranian government's mass killing of...

item.title: Call of Duty: Warzone is dropping PS4 and Xbox One support later this year
item.description: Activision is planning to drop support for PS4 and Xbox One consoles in Call of Duty: Warzone later this year. Players will need to upgrade to a PS5 or Xbox Series S / X console to continue...

item.title: YouTube takes baby steps to being a real podcast app
item.description: New features coming to YouTube could make it better for listening to podcasts, rolling out to Premium subscribers starting today on Android and coming later to iOS. A new "on-the-go mode" shifts...

item.title: What’s next for Microsoft’s Surface PCs?
item.description: Nearly 10 years ago I reviewed my favorite Surface device. Microsoft hand-delivered its Surface Studio all-in-one PC to me, and I was hooked from the moment I switched it on. It had a beautiful...

item.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary.
item.description: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

item.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
item.description: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a...

item.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 is out in October, and it’s coming to the Switch 2
item.description: Activision has officially announced Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 and says the game will launch on October 23rd, 2026. Modern Warfare 4, which is developed by Infinity Ward, will be available on...

item.title: The secret to Roku’s success: not being cool

item.title: Threat Actors Exploit Critical FortiClient EMS Flaw to Deploy Credential Stealer
item.description: Threat actors are continuing to exploit a critical, now-patched security flaw impacting FortiClient Endpoint Management Server (EMS) deployments to deliver credential-stealing malware. "The...

item.title: Here Comes Ojai, Waymo’s New Chinese-Made Robotaxi
item.description: The pale-blue Ojai vehicles will start picking up members of the public in California and Arizona today.

item.title: Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments

item.title: Waymo to begin passenger rides in its new Ojai robotaxi
item.description: After several months of testing, Waymo is finally ready to invite non-employee passengers into its newest vehicle, the Zeekr RT minivan, which has been rebranded as Ojai. Waymo says it will begin...

item.title: This sound card could give gamers a competitive edge
item.description: Fosi Audio announced a new sound card today with a unique feature designed to give FPS players an advantage. The C3 Gaming Sound Card, which sits outside your PC or laptop and connects with a...

item.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
item.description: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience powered and standalone Siri app.

item.title: These new iOS 27 renders hint at Siri’s big redesign
item.description: Apple's long-awaited Siri overhaul, expected to arrive in iOS 27, might look a lot like ChatGPT with a splash of Liquid Glass. Renders from Bloomberg offer a preview of iOS 27, including the new...

item.title: RSI is the new AGI — and it’s just as hard to pin down
item.description: A new crop of AI labs are focused on recursive self-improvement — but the goal is proving elusive.

item.title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Databricks’ co-founder on what kills enterprise AI deals
item.description: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.

item.title: YouTube adds new podcast features, including an AI recommendation tool and ‘Auto speed’
item.description: The update signals YouTube's ongoing efforts to compete with other platforms for podcast audiences.

item.title: CNN sues Perplexity over ‘verbatim’ copycat articles
item.description: CNN has filed a lawsuit against Perplexity, claiming that the startup's AI tools generate "verbatim" copies of its work, as reported earlier by CNN. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on...

item.title: Visa invests in Replit to power agentic payments for developers
item.description: Visa said that over 1,000 employees has been using Replit for prototyping and development
